title: Tuscan Frittata
description: A classic Italian-inspired egg dish made with creamy Tuscan flavors. Perfect for a quick and easy breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the Tuscan seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the beaten eggs and cook until the edges start to set.
Sprinkle the feta cheese and sour cream over the eggs.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley, if using.
Slice into wedges and serve warm.
